case_title: LEON, JUAN MANUEL VS CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION (APPEAL JUDGMENT) FILED AND SUBMITTED WITH FILE TO UNLIMITED JURISD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY LEON, JUAN MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON, JUAN MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF $3,200.77 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,248.77, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26265, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SERVETTI, CLIFF
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO BUREU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON, JUAN MANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO REPAIR PLAINTIFF'S ENGINE IN ACCORDANCE WITH CUSTOM ENGINE WARRANTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON, JUAN MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF $3,200.77 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,248.77, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26265 ON 8-4-00 FROM A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION - SUPERIOR COURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTOM ENGINE SHOP INC. SERVETTI, CLIFF
PURSUANT TO SUBPENA, DOCUMENTS RECEIVED FROM DEPT. OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS FILED
